item.title: GENIUS Act stablecoin rulemaking deadline arrives July 18 as OCC, FDIC, and Treasury finalize rules
SEC adds three crypto rules to July 2026 agenda: token offerings, broker-dealer custody, and market structure
EU MiCA now fully in force; crypto firms serving EU customers without a MiCA license must halt operations
Senate expected to take up CLARITY Act crypto market-structure bill during week of July 20 or July 27
UK FCA publishes crypto regulatory framework emphasizing international interoperability for trading firms
DTCC tokenization platform enters live production in July with BlackRock, JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs, and Circle
Morgan Stanley files for Ethereum and Solana staking ETFs; both under active SEC review
H1 2026 crypto losses reach $972M across 207 incidents; North Korea-linked actors took 66% of stolen funds
BONK DAO governance exploit drains $20M from Solana meme-coin treasury on July 6
Crypto wallet flaw Ill Bloom causes $5M in losses via weak key-generation randomness in affected wallets
White-hat researchers discover Aptos flaw that could have exposed $70B; patch deployed, no funds lost
SEC opens 60-day comment period on novel ETF products including staking-yield funds and altcoin baskets
FATF Travel Rule now enforced in more than 70 jurisdictions after 73% of assessed countries pass legislation
Bitcoin spot ETFs record their largest quarterly outflow since launch in Q2 2026
